member.name: T:Generator.DelimiterExtractor.ExtractionConfig
member.summary: Configuration for extraction.

member.name: T:Generator.DelimiterExtractor.ExtractedSection
member.summary: Represents an extracted section.

member.name: M:Generator.DelimiterExtractor.removeEmptyLines(System.String)
member.summary: Removes empty lines from content.

member.name: M:Generator.DelimiterExtractor.filterLines(System.String,Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpFunc{System.String,System.Boolean})
member.summary: Filters lines by a predicate.

member.name: M:Generator.DelimiterExtractor.toIndexedArray(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a line-indexed view of content. Similar to the XML project's array-based approach.

member.name: M:Generator.DelimiterExtractor.wrapLines(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Wraps each line with custom prefix/suffix.

member.name: M:Generator.DelimiterExtractor.replaceBetween(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Replaces content between delimiters.

member.name: M:Generator.DelimiterExtractor.findAll(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Finds all occurrences of a pattern and returns positions.

member.name: M:Generator.DelimiterExtractor.sliceToEnd(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: CMD-style substring: %var:~start% (to end)

member.name: M:Generator.DelimiterExtractor.slice(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets a substring using CMD-style slicing. %var:~start,length% equivalent.

member.name: M:Generator.DelimiterExtractor.tokenize(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Tokenizes content by a delimiter. Similar to CMD's tokenization but in F#.

member.name: M:Generator.DelimiterExtractor.extractHead(System.String)
member.summary: Extracts HTML head content.

member.name: M:Generator.DelimiterExtractor.extractBody(System.String)
member.summary: Extracts HTML body content.

member.name: M:Generator.DelimiterExtractor.extractCSS(System.String)
member.summary: Extracts CSS sections from HTML.

member.name: M:Generator.DelimiterExtractor.extractJavaScript(System.String)
member.summary: Extracts JavaScript sections from HTML.

member.name: M:Generator.DelimiterExtractor.extractSections(System.String,Generator.DelimiterExtractor.ExtractionConfig)
member.summary: Extracts all sections matching the delimiter pattern.

member.name: P:Generator.DelimiterExtractor.defaultConfig
member.summary: Default extraction config.

member.name: T:Generator.DelimiterExtractor
member.summary: Delimiter-based content extraction similar to the XML project approach. Extracts sections from HTML/JS/CSS using custom delimiters.

member.name: T:Generator.XmlStyleLiteral.TokenizedLine
member.summary: Represents a tokenized line from the XML project approach.

member.name: M:Generator.XmlStyleLiteral.exampleUsage
member.summary: Example usage demonstrating XML-style literal approach.

member.name: M:Generator.XmlStyleLiteral.toLiteralModule(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a complete XML-style literal module.

member.name: M:Generator.XmlStyleLiteral.extractAttribute(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Extracts attribute value from XML/HTML tag.

member.name: M:Generator.XmlStyleLiteral.extractTag(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Extracts content between XML-style tags.

member.name: M:Generator.XmlStyleLiteral.processConditional(System.String,System.String,Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpFunc{System.String,System.String},Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpFunc{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Processes content with conditional logic.

member.name: M:Generator.XmlStyleLiteral.evalCondition(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Boolean condition evaluation similar to CMD IF statements.

member.name: M:Generator.XmlStyleLiteral.echoLines(Microsoft.FSharp.Collections.FSharpList{System.String},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Echo-style output: writes each line with optional prefix/suffix.

member.name: M:Generator.XmlStyleLiteral.toVariableArray(Microsoft.FSharp.Collections.FSharpList{System.String},System.String)
member.summary: Creates an XML-style variable array from lines. Similar to: set line[0]=... set line[1]=...

member.name: M:Generator.XmlStyleLiteral.toCData(System.String)
member.summary: Wraps content in XML-style CDATA-like safe container. Uses F# triple-quoted strings as the equivalent.

member.name: M:Generator.XmlStyleLiteral.cmdReplace(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: CMD-style string replacement: %var:old=new%

member.name: M:Generator.XmlStyleLiteral.cmdSubstring(System.String,System.Int32,Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpOption{System.Int32})
member.summary: CMD-style %var:~start,length% substring.

member.name: M:Generator.XmlStyleLiteral.tokenizeLine(System.String,Microsoft.FSharp.Collections.FSharpList{System.String})
member.summary: CMD-style FOR /F tokenization in F#. Splits a line into tokens by delimiters.

member.name: T:Generator.XmlStyleLiteral
member.summary: XML-style literal handling inspired by the TurtleProtect XML project. Implements CMD-style tokenization and substring operations in F#.

member.name: T:Generator.EnhancedConverter.PageComponent
member.summary: Represents a page component.

member.name: P:Generator.EnhancedConverter.ConversionOptions.UseInterpolation
member.summary: Use interpolation for dynamic content

member.name: P:Generator.EnhancedConverter.ConversionOptions.SeparateScripts
member.summary: Extract and separate JS/CSS

member.name: P:Generator.EnhancedConverter.ConversionOptions.ModuleName
member.summary: Module name for generated code

member.name: P:Generator.EnhancedConverter.ConversionOptions.VariablePrefix
member.summary: Variable prefix for line variables

member.name: P:Generator.EnhancedConverter.ConversionOptions.UseLineVariables
member.summary: Use line-by-line variable approach

member.name: T:Generator.EnhancedConverter.ConversionOptions
member.summary: Conversion options.

member.name: M:Generator.EnhancedConverter.exampleConversion
member.summary: Example: Convert a simple HTML page.

member.name: M:Generator.EnhancedConverter.validate(System.String)
member.summary: Validates that the generated F# code is safe.

member.name: M:Generator.EnhancedConverter.convertWithLines(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Converts HTML with line-by-line variable approach. Best for very large files.

member.name: M:Generator.EnhancedConverter.convertQuick(System.String)
member.summary: Quick convert with default options.

member.name: M:Generator.EnhancedConverter.convert(System.String,Generator.EnhancedConverter.ConversionOptions)
member.summary: Converts HTML to F# using the enhanced safe string approach.

member.name: M:Generator.EnhancedConverter.buildModule(Microsoft.FSharp.Collections.FSharpList{Generator.EnhancedConverter.PageComponent},Generator.EnhancedConverter.ConversionOptions)
member.summary: Builds the complete F# module from components.

member.name: M:Generator.EnhancedConverter.convertComponent(Generator.EnhancedConverter.PageComponent,Generator.EnhancedConverter.ConversionOptions)
member.summary: Converts a single component to F# code.

member.name: M:Generator.EnhancedConverter.toLineModule(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Converts content to a line-based module with numbered variables.

member.name: M:Generator.EnhancedConverter.parseComponents(System.String,Generator.EnhancedConverter.ConversionOptions)
member.summary: Parses HTML into components.

member.name: P:Generator.EnhancedConverter.defaultOptions
member.summary: Default conversion options.

member.name: T:Generator.EnhancedConverter
member.summary: Enhanced HTML to F# converter using safe string techniques. Leverages F#'s triple-quoted strings for literal HTML embedding. Allows walking lines in html for literal extraction. This project creates a running linecount and classifies them.

member.name: T:Generator.Verification.VerificationReport
member.summary: Complete verification report.

member.name: T:Generator.Verification.ComparisonResult
member.summary: Result of comparing two HTML documents.

member.name: T:Generator.Verification.VerificationResult
member.summary: Result of a verification check.

member.name: T:Generator.Verification.VerificationConfig
member.summary: Configuration for HTML verification.

member.name: M:Generator.Verification.printReport(Generator.Verification.VerificationReport)
member.summary: Prints a verification report to the console.

member.name: M:Generator.Verification.formatReport(Generator.Verification.VerificationReport)
member.summary: Formats a verification report for display.

member.name: M:Generator.Verification.runAllChecks
member.summary: Runs all verification checks.

member.name: M:Generator.Verification.checkContentPreservation(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Checks content preservation between HTML and F# files.

member.name: M:Generator.Verification.runRoundTripTest(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Runs roundtrip test on files.

member.name: M:Generator.Verification.verifyRoundTrip(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Verifies roundtrip fidelity of HTML conversion.

member.name: M:Generator.Verification.compareHtml(Generator.Verification.VerificationConfig,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Compares two HTML strings for equivalence.

member.name: M:Generator.Verification.findOrphanHtmlFiles(System.String)
member.summary: Finds all orphan HTML files (HTML files without corresponding F# files).

member.name: M:Generator.Verification.hasBeenConverted(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if an HTML file has been converted to F#.

member.name: M:Generator.Verification.extractTagContent(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Extracts content from a specific HTML tag.

member.name: M:Generator.Verification.normalizeHtml(Generator.Verification.VerificationConfig,System.String)
member.summary: Normalizes HTML for comparison.

member.name: P:Generator.Verification.defaultConfig
member.summary: Default verification configuration.

member.name: T:Generator.Verification
member.summary: Verification module for HTML to F# conversion.

member.name: M:Generator.Program.convertToLines(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Converts HTML to F# using line-by-line variable mode.

member.name: M:Generator.Program.convertToLiteral(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Converts HTML to F# using triple-quoted literal mode.

member.name: M:Generator.Program.convertToGiraffeDsl(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Converts HTML to F# using the new proper Giraffe DSL converter.
